prompt: A playful, surreal studio portrait of a young woman mid-jump against a solid mustard-yellow background. She wears a cozy yellow nike football jersey tshirt , blue jeans, yellow socks, and green sneakers. Large over-ear headphones and round oval yellow sunglasses accent her look. She’s blowing a pink bubblegum bubble while accidentally spilling a coffee cup, frozen mid-air with dynamic motion. A fluffy white cat wearing tiny yellow glasses sits calmly on her shoulder. Bright, bold monochrome color palette, whimsical fashion editorial style, sharp focus, high-speed photography, soft studio lighting, ultra-detailed, modern aesthetic, 4k resolution.
